glossy.name: 清透润泽
glossy.suffix: beautiful young East Asian woman in her early twenties, delicate facial features, bright expressive eyes, soft glossy lips with natural makeup. Smooth luminous skin with subtle natural texture. Cinematic portrait photography, soft natural window light with gentle shadows. Realistic individual hair strands, slim and graceful figure, relaxed natural pose. Shot on a professional camera with 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face. Ultra-detailed, elegant, photorealistic. East Asian ethnicity only, Chinese or Japanese or Korean appearance.
